ABOUT US
CLOUD INFRASTRUCTURE CONSULTANT
Job Type
Full Time
Back

Location: Bangalore South, India (Full-time WFO role)

Reporting to: Lead – Infrastructure

Supervises: Cloud Engineers / System Administrators

Role Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Cloud Infrastructure Consultant to join our Infrastructure Services team. The consultant will serve as the cloud infrastructure expert, with strong emphasis on major cloud platforms (such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud), hybrid cloud deployments.

This role involves leading infrastructure, architecture design, cloud migration initiatives, high-availability deployments, disaster recovery planning, and optimization programs. The consultant must demonstrate hands-on expertise in Cloud platform, Load Balancers,Dockers, Managed Databases, Spaces, and cloud networking.

Required Skills and Qualifications
Technical Expertise
Cloud Architecture: Secure, scalable, high-availability solutions; multi-tier/multi-region designs; backup & disaster recovery; IAM & governance; cost optimization.
Cloud Migration & Hybrid Environments: AWS workload migration to DigitalOcean; on-premise to cloud migration; migration strategies (rehost, replatform, refactor); AWS services (EC2, VPC, RDS, S3, IAM, CloudWatch); cutover & rollback planning.
Infrastructure Security & Compliance: Security best practices; vulnerability assessments; infrastructure hardening; disaster recovery & business continuity planning; compliance with client policies.
Mandatory Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Engineering, or related field.
Minimum 7 years of IT infrastructure experience.
Hands-on expertise with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Azure, GCP, DigitalOcean).
Proven experience in AWS cloud migration projects.
Experience in disaster recovery implementation.
Practical knowledge of Docker and containerized applications.
Strong networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, VPNs, subnets, firewalls, load balancing).
Proficiency in Windows & Linux system administration.
Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation, etc.).
Desirable Qualifications
AWS Certified Solutions Architect.
Experience with Docker and container orchestration.
Advanced experience with Terraform or other IaC tools.
Exposure to enterprise or government IT projects.
Key Roles and Responsibilities
Design and implement secure, scalable, high-availability cloud infrastructure solutions.
Lead cloud migration initiatives ensuring minimal downtime and optimized performance.
Configure and manage AWS and DigitalOcean services.
Implement disaster recovery and business continuity plans.
Conduct vulnerability assessments and enforce compliance standards.
Optimize infrastructure for performance and cost efficiency.
Collaborate cross-functionally to deliver high-quality infrastructure solutions.
Personal Attributes
High integrity and accountability.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication and documentation abilities.
Client-focused and adaptable.
Commitment to continuous professional development.
Benefits
Why Join Us?
Impactful Work: Build cloud infrastructure that supports digital transformation across government and enterprise clients.
Career Growth: Work with diverse cloud platforms and complex enterprise deployments.
Competitive Compensation: Performance-driven rewards and recognition.
Collaborative Environment: Join a driven, inclusive team committed to innovation and excellence.
Apply Now
